Commodities.title: Will a dozen eggs cost between $2.50–$2.75 in May?
Commodities.why_it_matters: Egg prices signal avian flu pressure and poultry feed demand.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $200 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (2% odds) on crude reach $200. Closes in ~1mo. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $110 in May?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (8% odds) on crude reach $110. Closes in 7d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $70 in May?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (3% odds) on crude drop below $70. Closes in 7d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $85 in May?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Market pricing 70% odds crude will drop below $85. Closes in 7d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $70 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Lower-probability outcome (20%) that crude drop below $70. Closes in ~1mo. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $80 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Market pricing 62% odds crude will drop below $80. Closes in ~1mo. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Trade & Policy.title: Will Brazil win on 2026-06-13?
Trade & Policy.why_it_matters: Brazil's crop size directly competes with US soybean exports for the global market.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 50+ bps after the June 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 1% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 1% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the June 2026 meeting?
